subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1914-03-06
subcodes.first_line: Consider and reflect over the Favors and Bounties of the Blessed Perfection!.. I will send thee to America
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of the Manifestation of God
